identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a top 1% financial SaaS application with a professional, trustworthy, and efficient aesthetic.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Swiss precision with modern SaaS fluidity.
Emotion First: Trust and Clarity are the core emotions.
Content is King: Data legibility is paramount.
Zoom In: Focus on the numbers that matter.
Negative Space: Use whitespace to reduce cognitive load.

primary.description: Deep Obsidian for text and primary actions in light mode.

accent.description: Electric Royal Blue for CTAs, active states, and key highlights.

headings.usage: Page titles, section headers, KPI values.

mono.usage: Financial data, dates, transaction IDs, tabular numbers.

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 text-white shadow-sm font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white hover:bg-slate-50 text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 shadow-sm font-medium transition-all active:scale-95

cards.style: bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 shadow-sm rounded-xl overflow-hidden

inputs.style: h-10 rounded-md border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-white file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-slate-500 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-blue-600 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

images.description: Abstract Blue Geometric Background for Login/Hero

universal_guidelines: Use 'Manrope' for all headings and 'Inter' for body text.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for all currency and time data.
Ensure all interactive elements have hover states (text-white on hover for primary buttons).
Never use pure black (#000000). Use Slate-900 or Slate-950.
Charts must be accessible and use the defined color palette.
Forms must use 'react-hook-form' and 'zod' for validation (standard Shadcn pattern).
instructions_to_main_agent: You are building the MUL Salary Tracker. Follow the design system strictly. Use the provided image URLs for placeholders. Implement the Sidebar layout first, then the Dashboard with the Bento grid. Ensure the 'Daily Work Entry' form calculates values in real-time. Use Recharts for the bar charts. The theme is 'Professional Financial' - keep it clean, crisp, and trustworthy.
